type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
This facility (15-34) is reporting NOx, CO, VOC and PM2.5 emissions for 2014. This facility reported NOx, CO, VOC, and PM2.5 emissions for 2013. The following changes occurred from 2013 to 2014, respectively:
1) NOx emissions decreased by 64%
2) CO emissions decreased by 34%
3) VOC emissions increased by 7%
4) PM2.5 emissions decreased by 4%
Potential sources of these differences are:
1) Removed one (1) 325 hp compressor engine in October 2014.
2) Slight decrease in runtime on all engines and equipment in 2014.
2) Installed new equipment in October 2014: two (2) 1,450 hp compressor engines, one (1) boiler, and 21 heaters.
